subject: Escalation: apollo blockers for Canberra | Albert Einstein | Q3 review | INIT-7633
body: Please note the apollo stream in Canberra has shifted to a tighter timeline. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Prepare a fallback plan if integration testing slips beyond schedule. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. The retrospective section links this stream to lessons from Albert Einstein and Amelia Earhart. Reference initiative INIT-7633. Please add your comments before tomorrow morning. Tracking tags: coordination, timeline.
